name: Dal Tadka Tiffin
description: Yellow lentils tempered with cumin and garlic, served with steamed rice and roti.

name: Paneer Butter Masala Tiffin
description: Cottage cheese cubes in a rich tomato-cashew gravy with butter naan.

name: Chicken Curry Tiffin
description: Slow-cooked chicken curry, home-style spice blend, with rice and pickle.

name: Curd Rice Bowl
description: Cooling curd rice tempered with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and pomegranate.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with seasonal vegetables and fried onions.

name: Hyderabadi Chicken Biryani
description: Dum-cooked basmati rice with marinated chicken, served with raita.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Crisp rice crepe filled with spiced potato, served with sambar and chutney.

name: Idli Sambar (4 pcs)
description: Steamed rice cakes with lentil sambar and coconut chutney.

name: Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)
description: Warm milk-solid dumplings soaked in cardamom sugar syrup.

name: Masala Chai
description: Strong Assam tea brewed with ginger, cardamom, and milk.
